CustomField.description: This Condition, when NOT checked, indicates that if the selected Problem Code "Is Complaint Required" will enable the Complaint Validations. When it IS checked, the other "Restrict PC" fields are required, and the selected Problem Code is only validated when the Group and Indicators match the WO.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This Condition, when NOT checked, indicates that if the selected Problem Code "Is Complaint Required" will enable the Complaint Validations. When it IS checked, the other "Restrict PC" fields are required, and the selected Problem Code is only validated w
CustomField.label: Condition: Restrict PC Complaint Reqd
